summary: Unlock clear communication in code with HashNotAdam as he reveals how invisible contracts shape your apps.

talks.title: The Unspoken Contract: Communicating Intent Through Code
talks.description: Explore how code speaks to future devs! Join us as HashNotAdam uncovers the secrets of making your code's intent crystal clear, sharing lessons from a real-world Ruby bug. Perfect for anyone wanting less confusion and more collaboration in their projects!

summary: Exciting April line-up: Michael Milewski unpacks task runners and John Sherwood gushes over Rails 8! Come learn new developer tools and see Rail’s latest in action.

talks.title: Make vs Justfile vs Mise
talks.description: Not sure which task runner fits your workflow? Michael will demo Make, Justfile, Mise, and more—plus share the inside scoop on using Developer Infrastructure as Code. Tech tips, gotchas, and lively discussion await!

talks.title: rails 8 new
talks.description: Join John for an enthusiastic dive into Rails 8! Discover real production lessons, tools like Kamal and Action Cable, and the fun of interactive Q&A. Whether you love Rails or are just curious, it’s a can't-miss talk! ❤️

summary: Forms with Turbo and SQLite with Matt Hood and Simon Hildebrandt

talks.title: How on earth do you manage forms with Turbo?
talks.description: Join us for a fun dive into Turbo forms! We'll tackle quirky form challenges—error handling, redirects, streams, and validations. Discover practical tips and make Turbo forms a breeze! 🚀

talks.title: SQLite-ruby - a whole SQL database in a gem
talks.description: Discover the magic of SQLite wrapped up as a Ruby gem! Learn why this tiny yet mighty database is everywhere, and how to unleash its power easily in your next project. No fuss, just data wizardry! ✨

summary: Panel on business logic objects and diving into Rack fundamentals with Julian Pinzon, Adam, and Simon Hildebrandt

talks.title: Panel/Discussion/Riffing Session on Objects to encapsulate business logic
talks.description: Join Julian Pinzon and Adam for an engaging panel on the best ways to structure business logic outside of traditional Rails models. Share in audience discussions and gain new insights on smart code organization! Don't miss this lively session!

talks.title: Rack Fundamentals revisited
talks.description: Discover the core of Ruby web frameworks in this insightful talk by Simon Hildebrandt! Get a fresh look at Rack, understand its power, and see why you might not even need Rails for super-simple APIs. Come curious for some real developer ‘a-ha’ moments!

summary: Unlock smart search with Ruby! Damian Käm returns to show us how embeddings and RAG can level up your projects.

talks.title: Semantic Search and RAG with Ruby
talks.description: Discover how to build intelligent search systems in Ruby! Damian will guide you from embeddings to Retrieval-Augmented Generation, making complex search simple and practical for your projects. Perfect for anyone curious about AI and smart search systems!

summary: Explore Puma internals with Joshua Y. and discover fresh Ruby 3.4 and Rails 8 features with Anton Likhomanenko!

talks.title: The Inner Workings of Puma
talks.description: Curious about what makes Puma tick? Join Joshua Y. for an engaging exploration of Puma's architecture and configuration! Perfect for Rubyists looking to unleash the full power of their web server. Come and level up your Rails expertise!

talks.title: Ruby salad. What's fresh on the market?
talks.description: Get a delicious taste of what's new in Ruby 3.4 and Rails 8! Anton Likhomanenko guides you through hot new features, authentication tools and how Rails stacks up against Rodauth. Come see what's on the menu this year!

summary: AI coding showdown with Ceels and Ruby SAML wisdom from Pat — live on October 24th!

talks.title: Cursor v Github Copilot: building a better data schema tool?
talks.description: Curious about AI code helpers? Join Ceels as they compare Cursor with GitHub Copilot, demo configurations, and share the strengths and quirks of each tool. It's a fast-paced, candid peek into the future of code writing!

talks.title: Happy Ruby SAML Development
talks.description: Dive into the world of SAML with Pat! Discover how Covidence tackled SAML authentication in Ruby, including tips on feature testing and multi-domain setups. Perfect for devs wanting to make SSO fun and efficient!

summary: Hotwire happiness and Rails internals with Jero Paul and Darkfishy – Join us for modern Rails insights and practical magic!

talks.title: Turbo (Hotwire), Stimulusjs and being happy with front end development again
talks.description: Discover why Hotwire and Stimulusjs can revive your joy for frontend development! Jero Paul shares how modern Rails stacks make life easier for full stack developers, comparing the experience to working with React and friends. Come for the fun, leave inspired!

talks.title: How do `CurrentAttributes` work?
talks.description: Ever wondered how Rails keeps track of data during requests? Darkfishy demystifies ActiveSupport::CurrentAttributes with practical insights, code, and clear explanations, making Rails internals a breeze! Perfect for devs curious about what's under the hood.

summary: Dive into how Rails' reload! works with darkfishy and discover Oaken’s fresh approach to seeds with Julian Pinzon!

talks.title: How does `reload!` work?
talks.description: Bring your curiosity and join us to uncover the mysteries behind Rails console’s reload! command. Explore how classes reload, what happens with initializers, and more. It’s the behind-the-scenes look every Ruby developer needs!

talks.title: Oaken - A fresh take on seeds and fixtures
talks.description: Explore Oaken and how it’s redefining seeds and fixtures in Rails! Julian Pinzon presents a fresh perspective to speed up development and smooth your workflow. Perfect for anyone tired of traditional seeds and fixtures madness!

summary: Join us for inspiring tales of career change with Helen Stonehouse and a turbocharged session on Rails Engines by Chris Oliver!

talks.title: My Career Change - Nothing is what it seems
talks.description: Get inspired by Helen Stonehouse’s journey from one career to another! Full of relatable anecdotes, laughs, and lessons, this talk will motivate you to make brave changes—or just enjoy a great story. Don’t miss it!

talks.title: Rails Engines in 20 minutes
talks.description: Level up your Rails skills with Chris Oliver! In just 20 minutes, learn how to build plugins and use Rails Engines to supercharge your apps. Perfect for those hungry for practical, hands-on tips and real-world Rails magic.

summary: Vivid new web colors and insights on male allyship with Dan Laush and Nick Wolf

talks.title: Pinkest Pink
talks.description: Discover the dazzling world of new web colors and why the pinks are now pinker than ever! Dan Laush shares quirky facts about human vision and how tech recreates reality on your screen. It’s a fun, eye-opening exploration for all web enthusiasts!

talks.title: Being a Good Male Ally
talks.description: Join Nick Wolf as he explores what it means to be a supportive male ally in the workplace and community. Learn practical tips on fostering inclusivity and making positive change. A warm, thoughtful talk for everyone keen to build a better environment!

summary: Rebuilding Culture Amp's core and blending Laravel with Turbo, featuring Prakriti Mateti and an exploration of framework synergies.

talks.title: One does not simply... rebuild a product
talks.description: Hear Prakriti Mateti share the rollercoaster story of rebuilding Culture Amp's Performance product—from big decisions to boardroom buy-in and making engineering better along the way. Lessons, fails, and wins for everyone thinking about a product rebuild!

talks.title: Laravel, meet my friend Turbo
talks.description: Discover how Turbo, Turbo Native, and Strada can enhance your Laravel experience! This talk compares Turbo and Livewire and explores similarities with Rails. Perfect for anyone curious about cross-framework inspirations.

summary: Modern pagination with cursors—come learn why it's all the rage!

talks.title: Cursors: Why Pagination is Bad-gination!
talks.description: Tired of stale paginated data? Come discover how cursor-based pagination heats things up! We’ll break down the basics, demo it in Ruby, and show why it’s winning modern toolkits like GraphQL. Step up your data game—freshness guaranteed! 🍰

summary: Explore the inner workings of Rails with Antony Jenkins and discover his practical takeaways on learning Rails.

talks.title: Dissecting Rails
talks.description: Curious about how Rails works under the hood? Join Antony as he shares fun insights on learning Rails—from Active Support to Active Model. It’s a lively, beginner-friendly deep dive sure to shed light on your Rails journey!

summary: Ruby at scale and in the real world—Rian McGuire and Ponny tackle data crunching and the economics of our favourite language!

talks.title: One Billion Rows in Ruby
talks.description: Think Ruby can’t crunch big data? Rian McGuire takes on the One Billion Row Challenge and shows us the surprising power, tools, and optimization tips for heavy-duty Ruby. Come cheer on Ruby in its quest to beat Java!

talks.title: The Economics of Ruby
talks.description: Ever wondered how Ruby keeps running? Ponny shares the hidden world of Ruby’s economics—maintenance costs, generous companies, and passionate contributors. See what fuels our ecosystem in this lively lightning talk!

summary: Self-hosting Rails apps and distributed system scaling, with Saramic and Stefanus Wilfrid.

talks.title: Can I host a rails app from a home server?
talks.description: Discover the joys and challenges of running Rails at home! We'll explore self-hosting vs. the cloud, what’s involved, and whether bare metal is a viable adventure in 2024. Perfect for tinkerers and those nostalgic for the internet of 1999!

talks.title: System Design & Distributed System Lightweight Concept
talks.description: Let’s break down scaling your app! From fun basics of vertical vs. horizontal scaling to playful peeks into distributed systems and Kubernetes. Get real-world tips, chaos monkeys, and a lightweight look at the infrastructure powering today’s web.

summary: Email security and Ruby fibers, with HashNotAdam and KJ Tsanaktsidis.

talks.title: Processing DMARC reports via Action Mailbox
talks.description: Learn how to turn those cryptic DMARC XML email reports into useful, human-friendly alerts using Rails Action Mailbox! If you care about email security and want automation tips, this talk is for you. 📬✨

talks.title: Something Something Fibers Something
talks.description: Peek under Ruby's hood as we unravel the inner workings of fibers: how they relate to threads, call stacks, and async patterns. Perfect for geeks eager to understand Ruby’s concurrency magic! 🧵🔍

summary: Explore a year of developer growth with Justin and dive into Rails Engines architecture with Anton at this November meetup!

talks.title: Precious gems I've learned during my first dev year
talks.description: Join Justin as he shares the gems of wisdom, aha moments, and lessons gathered in his first year as a developer. An energizing lightning talk for new and seasoned devs alike—come get inspired and reflect together!

talks.title: Rails architecture with engines work group
talks.description: Let’s get hands-on with Rails Engines! Anton will demo his app and spark a lively, open discussion about using engines in real-world projects. Bring your stories, questions, and examples—everyone’s experience is welcome in this engaging community session.

summary: Final project showcase by Thdev and a deep dive into environment variables with Saramic.

talks.title: Showcase of final project of my bootcamp with Academy Xi
talks.description: Come see the journey from bootcamp to a working full stack app! Rails meets React in this inspiring demo showcasing a graduate’s final project, creativity, and real-world coding skill. A must-see for anyone interested in tech learning success!

talks.title: Thoughts on Environment Variables
talks.description: Unlock the secrets of safely managing environment variables in Rails! From basics to best practices, discover tips, tools, and traps to avoid in this sharp, practical talk. Stay safe and make configuration a breeze with Saramic!

summary: A lightning talk on Rails forms by Antulik and an inspiring journey into pair presenting techniques.

talks.title: Rails forms
talks.description: Get the scoop on Rails forms and service objects in a fast-paced lightning talk! Join Antulik for quick tips and tricks that will sharpen your Rails skills in minutes. Perfect for anyone looking to make forms shine in their apps!

talks.title: Unleashing the Power of Pair Presenting: Elevate Your Conference Impact
talks.description: Discover how pair presenting can make your next talk unforgettable! Dive into strategies, live coding, and interactive fun while learning how dynamic duos can increase inclusion, engagement, and stage impact. Perfect for those who love collaboration!

summary: Game dev fun with map7 and decoding Ruby mysteries with Rian McGuire

talks.title: Dragonruby: Creating the game "Metal Warrior: Search for Valhalla"
talks.description: Get a behind-the-scenes peek at making a 2D action game with Dragonruby! map7 shares highlights, surprises, and kid-approved testing stories. Come for game dev tales and stay for the laughs! 🎮✨

talks.title: But why does it work?
talks.description: Take the mystery out of code! Rian McGuire encourages you to dig into gems, Ruby internals, and more to demystify 'black boxes.' Gain the confidence to explore unfamiliar codebases in this inspiring and practical talk.

summary: Mentoring tips, a legendary production bug, and healthcare FHIR breakthroughs with Michael, Radar, and Matt Hood.

talks.title: Tips for juniors and mentors
talks.description: From pairing with the community to sharpening your Ruby skills and leveling up with coding dojos—this rapid-fire session packs practical advice for juniors and mentors alike. Come for bite-sized wisdom, leave ready to grow! 🌱

talks.title: A production bug 27 years in the making
talks.description: Dive into a true Ruby mystery! Despite green tests everywhere, a decades-old bug found its stage in production. Join us for a gripping, time-traveling tale of technical twists, unexpected turns, and what went down after the deploy! 🐞

talks.title: How FHIR is tackling a wicked problem with technical, social and political solutions
talks.description: Discover how HL7's FHIR is revolutionizing healthcare data sharing! We'll explore its technical brilliance and the lessons in community-building and advocacy it offers Rubyists. Get inspired by what’s making healthcare interoperable! ❤️‍🔥

summary: Taming I18n in Rails and tips for Junior Developers with David Carlin and Achhetr

talks.title: How to stop I18n getting complex
talks.description: Discover a simple, fresh approach to managing I18n in Rails! David Carlin shares unique ways to keep internationalization clear and straightforward—perfect for teams tired of key confusion. Don’t miss this quick, practical lightning talk!

talks.title: Exercism for Junior Developers
talks.description: Calling all juniors! Achhetr shines a light on TDD and pair programming using fun Exercism exercises. See hands-on problem-solving in action and pick up tips to confidently tackle technical challenges—ideal for new devs and bootcamp grads!

summary: Learn the art of technical writing with Oscar Alan Pierce, perfect for developers and engineers who want clearer docs!

talks.title: The Joy of Docs: Technical Writing for Developers and Engineers
talks.description: Unlock the secrets to effective technical writing! Oscar Alan Pierce will show you how to make your docs relatable, concise, and truly useful. Perfect for anyone who wants to boost their communication skills and empathize with their readers.

summary: Discover how Fresho uses View Components to supercharge Rails views with Vanessa Nimmo!

talks.title: View Components in the Wild
talks.description: See real-world magic with View Components! Vanessa Nimmo shares how Fresho leverages component-driven Rails for sleek, testable, and composable front ends. Get tips, code, and inspiration straight from the front lines!
